title: Picked Rick
description: A Mod For The Series Rick And Morty
body:
Welcome to the pickled Rick mod

 

In this cool mod we have added the portal gun.

To get the portal gun you need to craft it in a specific position with 2 iron blocks 1 red concrete and 1 emerald this is all subject to change.

But to even use the portal gun you will need to mind a specific crystal underground and right click your empty portal gun to put your crystal in.

After getting your complete portal gun you need to reload your portal gun with the same crystal by pressing the keybind whilst holding the portal gun.

Now to the functionality there will be another keybind to switch between the modes, mode 1 home mode and mode 2 dimension mode.

 

Home mode

Home mode will allow you to shift right click a block to save Ur current position into the portal gun then later right click the portal gun to teleport back (top: all portal guns can save their own positions

 

Dimension mode

Dimension mode will allow you to right click and teleport to one of 4 dimensions, the overworld, the nether,the end or our custom desert dimension.

 

Join our discord for more information, sneak peaks and more.

https://discord.gg/MsTB7gJaHX
